parameters.query:
INSERT INTO health_score_history (
  score, color, critical_unresolved, ips_blocked, workflow_errors_24h,
  stuck_executions_1h, hours_since_last_backup, health_check_ran_24h,
  clients_without_consent, gdpr_pending
)
SELECT
  score, color, critical_unresolved, ips_blocked, workflow_errors_24h,
  stuck_executions_1h, hours_since_last_backup, health_check_ran_24h,
  clients_without_consent, gdpr_pending
FROM system_health_score
RETURNING id, score, color, snapshot_at;
